modules.name: Root level files
modules.errorMessage: 🔥 Root files can bootstrap the app but should follow import rules. 🔥

modules.name: Features
modules.errorMessage: 🔥 A feature can only import items from shared folders, its own feature, or the public API (index.ts) of other features. 🔥

modules.name: Shared
modules.errorMessage: 🔥 Shared folders can't import items from the `features` or `app` folders. 🔥
